title: koanophyllon dolicholepis
intro: Koanophyllon dolicholepis, a plant species in the Asteraceae family, is commonly known as the false guava or yellow guava. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been used to treat various health conditions. Koanophyllon dolicholepis is reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including the relief of digestive issues and the treatment of wounds. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
